name: e22-plugins
description: Org-wide engineering standards for Claude Code. Ships steer (always-on operating rules + spec-workflow skills and templates) and re-lists Anthropic's frontend-design plugin (pinned, not forked) so product repos get distinctive UI craft from the same marketplace — org standards live in one place and update centrally instead of being frozen into every forked repo.

plugins.name: steer
plugins.description: An always-on engineering operating manual — stack defaults, monorepo layout, spec workflow, living documentation & action history, client-agnostic issue-tracker integration, testing rules, Definition of Done, pre-merge drift gates, high-risk areas, secrets handling, SOC 2 / ISO 27001-aligned delivery, change-size model, and the baseline patterns/anti-patterns. Injected every session via a SessionStart hook, with on-demand skills for repo bootstrap (the plugin bundles the full scaffold — no template repo), spec scaffolding, and ADRs.

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: Anthropic's official frontend-design skill, re-listed (not forked) so product repos install distinctive, non-generic UI craft from one marketplace. Pinned by SHA — bump it to update. Scoped to the stack and DESIGN.md uniformity discipline by steer's /steer:reference design-sources; defer to a committed design export when one exists.
